3172740.name: Slash Quest Soundtrack
3172740.description:
Stumble your way through the quirky world of Slash Quest with its original soundtrack, brought to you by the wonderfully odd Breakmaster Cylinder. This collection of five tracks captures the bumbling spirit of each wobbly area in the game.
Whether you're slicing through chores or just wanna cut loose, this soundtrack's got the perfect edge. Grab your headphones and let Slash Quest's music sharpen your mood!
